prestazioni: 3S-GTE (Gen 3) engine rebuild with forged internals: JE 87mm forged pistons (9.0:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings, and a Tomei 272° duration camshaft kit with adjustable vernier pulleys for precise valve timing. Pair with a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe with a 4-inch straight-pipe exhaust system featuring a Burns Stainless 4-2-1 header and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for 28 psi peak boost on 100-octane fuel.

Full Group A WRC-spec drivetrain reinforcement: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way) in the rear differential, Cusco 1.5-way front LSD, and a Tilton 7.25-inch twin-disc clutch with a billet flywheel. Replace the stock driveshafts with custom CV Driveshafts 300M steel axles and uprated tripod joints. Use a Quaife ATB helical differential in the center for optimal torque distribution.

Suspension and chassis tuning: Öhlins TTX40 4-way adjustable coilovers with 800 lb/in front springs and 600 lb/in rear springs, polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0115K) for the front control arms, and a full Cusco roll cage (8-point, bolt-in) with integrated strut tower braces. Install a Whiteline front sway bar (24mm adjustable) and a Cusco rear sway bar (22mm) to reduce body roll. Use spherical bearing end links from Hardrace for precise suspension geometry.
estetica: Full ST185 WRC Group A replica aero kit by Rocket Bunny (Pandem), including the widebody fender flares, front canards, rear diffuser, and a carbon fiber GT wing with adjustable angle (30-45 degrees). Paint in Toyota Motorsport livery (white with red/blue accents) and apply 3M 1080 vinyl wraps for sponsor decals (e.g., Castrol, Recaro, and Sparco).

OEM+ WRC interior: Recaro Sportster CS seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede), and a full carbon fiber dashboard overlay by Seibon. Replace the stock gauge cluster with a Defi Advance BF series 6-gauge pod (boost, oil pressure, water temp, fuel pressure, EGT, and wideband AFR) and a GReddy Profec boost controller mounted on the center console.

Lightweight exterior modifications: Seibon carbon fiber hood (with functional vents) and trunk lid, polycarbonate rear quarter windows (by Lexan), and a set of Enkei RPF1 wheels (17x9 +25 front, 17x10 +30 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (235/40/17 front, 265/35/17 rear). Add a custom front splitter with a 30mm overhang and a carbon fiber rear diffuser with integrated brake ducts.
